name: Executive Dashboard Project
description: Blazor Server executive reporting dashboard with milestone tracking and work item management

milestones.name: Phase 1: Architecture & Setup
milestones.description: Define system design, project structure, and component architecture

milestones.name: Phase 2: Core Components
milestones.description: Implement dashboard layout, timeline, and metrics components

milestones.name: Phase 3: Data Integration
milestones.description: Integrate DataProvider service and finalize JSON deserialization

milestones.name: Phase 4: Polish & Optimization
milestones.description: Performance optimization, CSS refinement, and screenshot validation

workItems.title: Implement MilestoneTimeline component
workItems.description: Create horizontal timeline with status indicators and color coding for milestone visualization

workItems.title: Build ProjectMetrics display
workItems.description: Design KPI cards for completion %, health status, and velocity indicators with responsive layout

workItems.title: Create WorkItemSummary component
workItems.description: Render work items in three-column layout by status category with item counts and descriptions

workItems.title: Design dashboard CSS grid
workItems.description: Responsive layout optimized for 1024x768 and 1920x1080 resolutions with print-ready styling

workItems.title: Implement DataProvider service
workItems.description: Load and cache data.json on startup with comprehensive error handling and logging

workItems.title: Add JSON deserialization
workItems.description: Map JSON data to Project, Milestone, WorkItem, and ProjectMetrics models with validation

workItems.title: Optimize page load performance
workItems.description: Achieve sub-1-second load time with client-side caching and asset compression strategies

workItems.title: Configure Blazor Server startup
workItems.description: Set up Program.cs with DI container and middleware for DataProvider initialization

workItems.title: Validate screenshot quality
workItems.description: Test rendering at multiple resolutions for PowerPoint compatibility and visual consistency

workItems.title: Create deployment documentation
workItems.description: Document setup, configuration, and Windows executable generation for end users

workItems.title: Test cross-browser compatibility
workItems.description: Verify rendering consistency across Chrome and Edge browsers with screenshot validation
